Emergency Matching Link: ****[https://secure.winred.com/georgians-for-kelly/november-eom/6x-match/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56924943:W_kY7nKNy:m:1:2247059263:FD1BCDA798E41B645B2F28E34CE261F6:r)******_****_
---

Peter,_
_
We are facing tough odds as we approach this major fundraising goal.

**Democrats are outspending us, and at this rate, we are at serious risk of being outraised.** I'm calling on you because I know you don't want to see Socialist Democrats take complete control of our nation.

[**Will you rush a 6x matched donation to help us reach this critical goal? Time is running out and I need you, Peter.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56924943:W_kY7nKNy:m:1:2247059263:FD1BCDA798E41B645B2F28E34CE261F6:r)

**I 'm only able to grant a select group of supporters 6x matching status. Please don't waste it, Peter.**

The Senate and the future of our country hinges on my runoff. Are you willing to sit this fight out and risk a complete takeover by the Radical Left?

**I 'm ready to take back Georgia and keep fighting for our shared values. ****[Will you rush any amount before the November 30th deadline?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56924943:W_kY7nKNy:m:1:2247059263:FD1BCDA798E41B645B2F28E34CE261F6:r)**

I've seen what Democrats have in mind for our country. ANTIFA runs rampant, defunding the police, Green New Deal, packing the Supreme Court, and the destruction of the conservative agenda.

**You have this chance, right now, to stop them. Will you take it?****[Make a 6x matched donation immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56924943:W_kY7nKNy:m:1:2247059263:FD1BCDA798E41B645B2F28E34CE261F6:r)**

Thank you for your dedicated support.__

Kelly Loeffler

_****_
[**6X MATCH NOW**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56924943:W_kY7nKNy:m:1:2247059263:FD1BCDA798E41B645B2F28E34CE261F6:r)

The maximum allowable contribution per individual to Georgians for Kelly Loeffler is $5,600 ($2,800 for the general and $2,800 designated for a potential general run-off election).
A couple may contribute up to $11,200 ($5,600 for the general and $5,600 designated for a potential general run-off election) if drawn on a joint account and if this form is completed and signed by both contributors.
Federal Multi candidate PAC's may contribute $5,000 per election.
Federal law requires that Georgians for Kelly Loeffler use best efforts to report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.
Contributions to Georgians for Kelly Loeffler are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals who are not lawfully admitted for permanent residence, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Contributions are subject to federal contribution limits.
By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from Georgians for Kelly Loeffler. | | Friend, **Did you know that in the state of Minnesota, residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state?** Unlike some other deals today, this one isn't too good to be true. [**As results continue to roll in, things are getting DESPERATE for our efforts to secure a GOP victory and protect Trump 's legacy!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sJNMHk2igMgwGRq-QopI-pR2FwahDjzgykIT3Ef4qD0manbh26w3L_GVTYnJMPAc4p__a0De-KkE792QBqLOxCEDk28UNy3pe_yp8Zw04_MZHSsigsWMJU0c-6-gQgghAOWMwZ9gg0F8lDjttn_DF9n2jCgOU1UZWHCHtVGlqpwka5r4p26DCrJ2FkhnctyiafU4o_dS9MuuogBwGPBsgaqp06orjXTccmNqWHL5K88yUbAORjlKI-L2XyhDJ1P8TjT_GjNaf6snVnMTNar1ZcF2hOT6bDT-4li-WFzL0yKg6-iF4IeRpmC2nsfC-b7th8mse7OlAt6Ji4KiiEoUJWArY0iOpK-usnBQI61SqZi5RH0XELWNfF2Vxod9x6aLKrU8vESi8QjTH6DnYIWDEWgGWKk-uSQNuF9GiIUkaAqI3WXl7ME2LyRiGogeu_z460rriFhtZaE=&c=3INasMAJr-Q2ZOG4AnJQMyHu5hPOMuKkuNLjzPycFzKOKX_A0U8MIA==&ch=JhlUdd6KboWMoEBmLJhwSYRiUJH4f7Dfr-O4FxqmkxrW-wdKrkV99g==)

[**EMERGENCY 500% MATCH STATUS: ACTIVE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sJNMHk2igMgwGRq-QopI-pR2FwahDjzgykIT3Ef4qD0manbh26w3L_GVTYnJMPAc4p__a0De-KkE792QBqLOxCEDk28UNy3pe_yp8Zw04_MZHSsigsWMJU0c-6-gQgghAOWMwZ9gg0F8lDjttn_DF9n2jCgOU1UZWHCHtVGlqpwka5r4p26DCrJ2FkhnctyiafU4o_dS9MuuogBwGPBsgaqp06orjXTccmNqWHL5K88yUbAORjlKI-L2XyhDJ1P8TjT_GjNaf6snVnMTNar1ZcF2hOT6bDT-4li-WFzL0yKg6-iF4IeRpmC2nsfC-b7th8mse7OlAt6Ji4KiiEoUJWArY0iOpK-usnBQI61SqZi5RH0XELWNfF2Vxod9x6aLKrU8vESi8QjTH6DnYIWDEWgGWKk-uSQNuF9GiIUkaAqI3WXl7ME2LyRiGogeu_z460rriFhtZaE=&c=3INasMAJr-Q2ZOG4AnJQMyHu5hPOMuKkuNLjzPycFzKOKX_A0U8MIA==&ch=JhlUdd6KboWMoEBmLJhwSYRiUJH4f7Dfr-O4FxqmkxrW-wdKrkV99g==)

_THIS IS NOT THE TIME TO STAND IDLY BY! _

There is still a huge amount of work to be done to protect Trump's legacy, so you can't sit back!

We must turn things around -- ASAP. [**So we 're 500% matching all gifts made in the next 20 MINUTES.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sJNMHk2igMgwGRq-QopI-pR2FwahDjzgykIT3Ef4qD0manbh26w3L_GVTYnJMPAc4p__a0De-KkE792QBqLOxCEDk28UNy3pe_yp8Zw04_MZHSsigsWMJU0c-6-gQgghAOWMwZ9gg0F8lDjttn_DF9n2jCgOU1UZWHCHtVGlqpwka5r4p26DCrJ2FkhnctyiafU4o_dS9MuuogBwGPBsgaqp06orjXTccmNqWHL5K88yUbAORjlKI-L2XyhDJ1P8TjT_GjNaf6snVnMTNar1ZcF2hOT6bDT-4li-WFzL0yKg6-iF4IeRpmC2nsfC-b7th8mse7OlAt6Ji4KiiEoUJWArY0iOpK-usnBQI61SqZi5RH0XELWNfF2Vxod9x6aLKrU8vESi8QjTH6DnYIWDEWgGWKk-uSQNuF9GiIUkaAqI3WXl7ME2LyRiGogeu_z460rriFhtZaE=&c=3INasMAJr-Q2ZOG4AnJQMyHu5hPOMuKkuNLjzPycFzKOKX_A0U8MIA==&ch=JhlUdd6KboWMoEBmLJhwSYRiUJH4f7Dfr-O4FxqmkxrW-wdKrkV99g==)

name: Tim Scott
subject: Here’s what’s at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
As we near the end-of-month deadline, I want to remind you what we stand to lose if we lose in Georgia and lose the Senate Majority.
Friend,

As we near the end-of-month deadline, I want to remind you what we stand to lose if we lose in Georgia and lose the Senate Majority.

Our Republican Majority delivered historic tax cuts and created Opportunity Zones to help our struggling communities thrive. [**Help us pass more tax cuts.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/heres-whats-at-stake/?utm_campaign=20201127_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1041502-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201127_heres-whats-at-stake)

We delivered a record number of conservative judges for the federal bench and put two Justices on the Supreme Court. [**Help us stop liberal judges**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/heres-whats-at-stake/?utm_campaign=20201127_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1041502-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201127_heres-whats-at-stake)

We have stopped socialist ideas like a government take-over of healthcare and the job-killing green new deal. [**Help prevent socialism.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/heres-whats-at-stake/?utm_campaign=20201127_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1041502-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201127_heres-whats-at-stake)

Friend, I am truly worried that all our hard work will be reversed if the Democrats win control of the Senate in January.

[**Friend, can you chip in $100, $50, $25, or anything you can to help us make our end-of-month fundraising goals and save the Senate majority?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/heres-whats-at-stake/?utm_campaign=20201127_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1041502-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201127_heres-whats-at-stake)

If the Democrats gain total control, we will be powerless to stop them as they ram socialist policies, liberal judges, and taxes and regulations through the Senate.

clean_body: As we near the end-of-month deadline, I want to remind you what we stand to lose if we lose in Georgia and lose the Senate Majority. Friend, As we near the end-of-month deadline, I want to remind you what we stand to lose if we lose in Georgia and lose the Senate Majority. Our Republican Majority delivered historic tax cuts and created Opportunity Zones to help our struggling communities thrive. We delivered a record number of conservative judges for the federal bench and put two Justices on the Supreme Court. We have stopped socialist ideas like a government take-over of healthcare and the job-killing green new deal. Friend, I am truly worried that all our hard work will be reversed if the Democrats win control of the Senate in January. If the Democrats gain total control, we will be powerless to stop them as they ram socialist policies, liberal judges, and taxes and regulations through the Senate. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Arrests on Thanksgiving
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=arrests_on_thanksgiv&n=1)
---
Peter \-- How was your Thanksgiving yesterday? Did you celebrate with family and friends? **From what I saw when driving around my neck of the woods, many Minnesotans defied Governor Walz' orders banning social gatherings. But was anybody arrested?** Walz' newest Executive Order makes it illegal for us peasants to have anyone inside our home that's not from our family. And if we violate his edict, we could face 90 days in jail. On Wednesday night, Rep-Elect Erik Mortensen held his backyard get-together to show the absurdity of Walz' order. Even after receiving a letter from the Attorney General, he was not deterred from gathering with friends. Just like many of us went ahead with our Thanksgiving plans.
## Because that's what patriots do...We Stand Up to Tyranny!!!
Our movement needs heroes and, from my perspective, there is another one emerging on the scene in Southern Minnesota named Larvita McFarquhar. She owns a gymnastics studio, coaches youth sports and operates a small restaurant. When Walz' decided her businesses were not essential, she stood up and said she would not comply. **But that definance has put her in the crosshairs of the Sheriff, Health Dept and even the Attorney General. Keith Ellison is threatening her with massive fines and a year of jail time.** For what? Operating a legal business in AMERICA?! I will not stand for this assault on the freedoms of our fellow Minnesotans. We can't let this tyrant get away with it. We're learning every day about more and more cases of Minnesota business owners who are willing to stand up to this power drunk Governor. In all cases, we go right to work. Action 4 Liberty has a top notch team around the state of Minnesota. We are able to locate activists in areas like Marshall and put the heat on local officials to protect the liberties of people like Larvita. **But we're outmatched and outgunned by the other side. We don't only have to go up against the Democrat, tyrant sympathizers, we also have to go up against the enablers of the Republican establishment.** You can close that gap by supporting Action 4 Liberty with a contribution. Equip us with the tools and resources to bring the heat to the political class so we can protect the liberties of Minnesotans. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=arrests_on_thanksgiv&n=2 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=arrests_on_thanksgiv&n=3)
---
Our team knows where the pressure points are. Minnesotans have had ENOUGH of Walz' unilateral orders, so we'll have the wind at our back.
Help us get our message to more Minnesotans and help us fund our pressure campaign. Hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans NEED to hear our message of liberty NOW. And every legislator that can be swayed must feel the pain by the time they meet again.
## [Yes, I want to STOP Governor Walz!](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=arrests_on_thanksgiv&n=4)
Thank you in advance for your contribution.
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**P.S.****[Please help us expand our voice. Pitch in $100 if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or for max pain, donate $1,000.](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=arrests_on_thanksgiv&n=5)**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=arrests_on_thanksgiv&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=arrests_on_thanksgiv&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=arrests_on_thanksgiv&n=8), software for leaders.

This situation could not be more urgent. The two U.S. Senate runoff elections next door in Georgia on January 5th will decide who wins majority control... if the Democrats win, they’ll be positioned to seize FULL CONTROL of our federal government next year! We’re sending all the support we can to Senator David Perdue and Senator Kelly Loeffler. It’s all hands-on deck to KEEP GEORGIA RED and SAVE THE SENATE. Today, we’re setting a goal to raise $18,000 before we close out the month on Monday. **[>> Rush a $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 emergency contribution to help! <<](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/96019cb15a59cf90/54061a38102cbeb6c3d6b838967d376c/32613)** You’ve likely seen the headlines. name: Marco Rubio
subject: Do you know Raphael Warnock?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Peter,
**My friend Senator Kelly Loeffler is in a tough runoff battle in Georgia against the most radical Democrat in the country.**
Do you know who Raphael Warnock is?
* He hosted **Communist dictator Fidel Castro** at his church
* He preached "_you cannot serve God and the military._ "
* He is being fully supported by **Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez**

| | Dear Peter \-- With the prevalence of mental illness increasing before and during the pandemic, it is more important than ever that our elected officials and those running for elected office provide concrete plans for addressing the mental health crisis. That’s why I just released a policy paper detailing how I will address mental health and incarceration as District Attorney, including a groundbreaking policy to spend $50 million a year from financial forfeitures on mental health programs, a 1620 percent increase from Cy Vance’s previous investments. It’s a shame that for decades, our city’s response to mental health crises has been to simply arrest New Yorkers and send them to Rikers. **As your next Manhattan District Attorney, I will do everything in my power to create the most holistic healing criminal justice system in our nation to tackle the roots of crime, which will make our borough and our city a safer place for all. ** [_**Our critical (yes, critical) end of month fundraising deadline is this Monday, and we need $10,000 from grassroots supporters like you to keep our voter contact and community engagement programs running at full capacity. Can you chip in now to our campaign for change? 100% of your donation goes directly to building our team, contacting voters, and organizing with impacted communities in NYC.**_](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=778bf5b60a&e=7758ed002e)

name: Mitch McConnell
subject: Here’s what you need to know about Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Right now, Democrats have ALL of the momentum in Georgia, which is why I'm reaching out to YOU today. You've proven to be one of the STRONGEST SUPPORTERS of our conservative agenda, and I knew that you'd be willing to STEP UP so we can GUARANTEE that we keep the Senate RED.
****
_****_

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Shop local, shop online
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Rhode Island businesses have been hit hard during this pandemic, especially our small businesses. I always ask Rhode Islanders to shop local during Small Business Saturday, but this year I'm also asking you to please shop online. To make it easier than ever for you to support local businesses, we have an [online directory](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gSU0hxq8eQoOHiito9XG-k8iqKUktVoEQFBgDwxmztWN3BRBj4q9aU5FRpmMWGE4YV4jqaFLb0h-o61z1IC6TXcvUArL4m040-gRXAkIJ5d0KYRhVhl52mAJeZ-mVaZauf7liD--cti-w9QMbp3voQor1YT4Sg1v&c=ygGP32kLNFiK4ik6d-o4asdjkMt9cFoghQ_7G0o8qT_luZpW4mFGHg==&ch=KLzEHCb66zWQ6MrhwVT-X5EgTL7Dmw58b2Prip_-6tqVrRkojRtFHw==) that will help you find everything you need.
This website, which already lists more than 1500 businesses, was created by one of our local companies, Visual Thrive -- built for Rhode Islanders by Rhode Islanders. Rhode Island Monthly, the Rhode Island Foundation, and our tourism bureaus are joining forces with us to get the word out. And if you own a local business and want to be a part of this digital directory - visit [ShopLocalRhodeIsland.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gSU0hxq8eQoOHiito9XG-k8iqKUktVoEQFBgDwxmztWN3BRBj4q9aU5FRpmMWGE4YV4jqaFLb0h-o61z1IC6TXcvUArL4m040-gRXAkIJ5d0KYRhVhl52mAJeZ-mVaZauf7liD--cti-w9QMbp3voQor1YT4Sg1v&c=ygGP32kLNFiK4ik6d-o4asdjkMt9cFoghQ_7G0o8qT_luZpW4mFGHg==&ch=KLzEHCb66zWQ6MrhwVT-X5EgTL7Dmw58b2Prip_-6tqVrRkojRtFHw==), and you can sign up for free.
Our local small business owners have gone above and beyond to keep their customers and employees safe during this crisis. Let's show our support and gratitude by shopping local--and online--this holiday season.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gSU0hxq8eQoOHiito9XG-k8iqKUktVoEQFBgDwxmztWN3BRBj4q9aU5FRpmMWGE4vSpw4jnE1C8Oni0i4WLNpy2w1h4N8JfimLF3z50D81pBk-DKh5kx1F2oE60J4ioaHr2bCUlhL3Fy98rIfprjLyrtrS2GYLv5XKT0oT5PAjluwRmFp6OxJCmFePdsvaBQKeNFmENUOvspWkdBHVJwAIq3xdm9DSBMdK_cSS8kiYSPOkwXqRA13_6Uwiao6NR6xXI33TytYXG8F06Tg0zSv9LZW3wbEiTvUxo_Wfqnn_AiKaOmWKcE34RV43yJSuGXy_GQE0JYz3o=&c=ygGP32kLNFiK4ik6d-o4asdjkMt9cFoghQ_7G0o8qT_luZpW4mFGHg==&ch=KLzEHCb66zWQ6MrhwVT-X5EgTL7Dmw58b2Prip_-6tqVrRkojRtFHw==).
---

| Friend,

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Happy Thanksgiving from Judicial Watch
body: [Advertisement] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52143&L=21166&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1RcWk1Q3Y0T0ZKZyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTEyNzIzNDc1OA==] [WEEKLY UPDATE] HAPPY THANKSGIVING! Each year I like to remind our supporters to recall what life was like for the Pilgrims who arrived on these shores in December of 1620. As the Plimoth Plantation [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52143&L=11088&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGxpbW90aC5vcmcvbGVhcm4vanVzdC1raWRzL2hvbWV3b3JrLWhlbHAvd2hvLXdlcmUtcGlsZ3JpbXM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjcyMzQ3NTg=] describes: Many of the colonists fell ill. They were probably suffering from scurvy and pneumonia caused by a lack of shelter in the cold, wet weather. Although the Pilgrims were not starving, their sea-diet was very high in salt, which weakened their bodies on the long journey and during that first winter. As many as two or three people died each day during their first two months on land. Only 52 people survived the first year in Plymouth. When Mayflower left Plymouth on April 5, 1621, she was sailed back to England by only half of her crew. Nevertheless, a year after their arrival they sat down for a feast of thanksgiving. They had befriended and made a treaty of mutual protection with the Pokanoket Wampanoag leader, Ousamequin, also known as Massasoit to the Pilgrims. In the fall of 1621, the colonists marked their first harvest with a three-day celebration. Massasoit and 90 of his men joined the English for feasting and entertainment. In the 1800s this famous celebration became the basis for the story of the First Thanksgiving. It would be easy to focus on the passing difficulties of our time, especially for those of us who fight daily to preserve the God-given liberties that have blessed this land since the time of the Pilgrims. But, as they did, we must pause to reflect on all that is good and on the Source of this goodness. And as President Washington reminded Americans in his 1789 first Thanksgiving Proclamation [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52143&L=21332&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9mb3VuZGVycy5hcmNoaXZlcy5nb3YvZG9jdW1lbnRzL1dhc2hpbmd0b24vMDUtMDQtMDItMDA5MT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTEyNzIzNDc1OA==], we must also pray for good, constitutional government: ...beseech him to pardon our national and other transgressions—to enable us all, whether in public or private stations, to perform our several and relative duties properly and punctually—to render our national government a blessing to all the people, by constantly being a Government of wise, just, and constitutional laws, discreetly and faithfully executed and obeyed... As I reflect on this I am particularly thankful for all of you who donate to support our just cause [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52143&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTI3MjM0NzU4] and for your many messages of encouragement you send to me and my hard working Judicial Watch colleagues who, in “private stations”, work for a “wise, just, and constitutional” government. We will continue to fight for the truth and transparency, shed light into the darkness and be a small beacon of hope for you and of other patriots our great nation. Thank you for your continued support [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52143&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTI3MjM0NzU4] and, on behalf of all of us at Judicial Watch, I wish you and yours a most blessed Thanksgiving and Christmas season! Until next week, [Contribute] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52143&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTI3MjM0NzU4] [32x32x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52143&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTI3MjM0NzU4] [32x32x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52143&L=14&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTI3MjM0NzU4] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52143&L=15&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vdXNlci9KdWRpY2lhbFdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTI3MjM0NzU4] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52143&L=1285&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTEyNzIzNDc1OA==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2020, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52143&L=885&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL21lbWJlcnMuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTI3MjM0NzU4] | Unsubscribe [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/unsubscribe.php?M=27089954&C=eea98a79fb2fad93cccd0bd228df4000&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=38&N=52143&AGENCY=jw] View in browser [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?&L=1&M=27089954&N=52143&AGENCY=jw&]

As I reflect on this I am particularly thankful for all of you who donate to support our just cause [] and for your many messages of encouragement you send to me and my hard working Judicial Watch colleagues who, in “private stations”, work for a “wise, just, and constitutional” government. We will continue to fight for the truth and transparency, shed light into the darkness and be a small beacon of hope for you and of other patriots our great nation. Thank you for your continued support [] and, on behalf of all of us at Judicial Watch, I wish you and yours a most blessed Thanksgiving and Christmas season!
